generators.label: Admin UI SDK extension

provisioning.label: Admin UI SDK
provisioning.help: Install the Adobe Commerce Admin UI SDK module in the Commerce instance. https://developer.adobe.com/commerce/extensibility/admin-ui-sdk/

files.content: ${menuName}

generators.postNote: Admin UI SDK renders this App Builder UI inside the Commerce admin. Declare required ACL resources (commerce-saas/admin-ext-permissions). Run `aio app dev` to preview.

generators.label: API Mesh source

provisioning.label: API Mesh
provisioning.help: Requires an Adobe I/O project with API Mesh provisioned. https://developer.adobe.com/graphql-mesh-gateway/

generators.postNote: Run `aio api-mesh update mesh.json` to apply. Secrets/keys belong in .env / runtime params, never inline in mesh.json (commerce-saas/mesh-secrets-in-env).

generators.label: Catalog Service (products)

provisioning.label: Catalog Service
provisioning.help: Enable Commerce Services Connector + SaaS data export. https://experienceleague.adobe.com/en/docs/commerce-merchant-services/catalog-service

generators.postNote: Catalog Service serves fast catalog data (PDP/PLP). Pair with Live Search for discovery; both ride the Catalog GraphQL endpoint via API Mesh.

generators.label: Commerce Webhook (synchronous)

files.content:
<?xml version="1.0"?>
<!-- ${hookName} — synchronous Commerce webhook. Secrets go in the webhook config/.env, never here. -->
<config xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:noNamespaceSchemaLocation="urn:magento:module:Magento_AdobeCommerceWebhooks:etc/webhooks.xsd">
  <method name="${method}" type="after">
    <hooks>
      <batch name="${hookName}">
        <hook name="${hookName}" url="${url}" method="POST" timeout="5000" softTimeout="1000" priority="100" required="true">
          <fields>
            <field name="payload" source="data" />
          </fields>
        </hook>
      </batch>
    </hooks>
  </method>
</config>

generators.postNote: Synchronous outbound hook — Commerce waits for the response, so keep the endpoint fast. Place under app/code or the webhooks config per your deployment.

generators.label: Data Connection (XDM event mapping)

provisioning.label: Data Connection
provisioning.help: Install the Data Connection module + configure a datastream. https://experienceleague.adobe.com/en/docs/commerce-merchant-services/data-connection

generators.postNote: Forwards first-party Commerce events to AEP/Analytics/Target via the datastream. XDM field types MUST match the Commerce event schema (commerce-saas/data-connection-schema).

generators.label: I/O Events consumer (Commerce events)

provisioning.label: Adobe I/O Events for Commerce
provisioning.help: Install the Adobe I/O Events module + register the Commerce event provider. https://developer.adobe.com/commerce/extensibility/events/

generators.postNote: Register the action as an event consumer in app.config.yaml and subscribe to ${eventCode}. I/O Event deliveries can REPEAT — make the handler idempotent (use event.id) (commerce-saas/idempotent-event-handlers).

generators.label: Live Search (productSearch)

provisioning.label: Live Search
provisioning.help: Enable in the Commerce admin: Commerce Services Connector + SaaS data export + Live Search. https://experienceleague.adobe.com/en/docs/commerce-merchant-services/live-search

generators.postNote: Live Search is AI-powered (Sensei). Send the productSearch query through API Mesh / the Catalog endpoint; the EDS storefront consumes it via @dropins/storefront-product-discovery.

generators.label: Payment Services webhook handler

provisioning.label: Payment Services
provisioning.help: Onboard Payment Services + a merchant account. https://experienceleague.adobe.com/en/docs/commerce-merchant-services/payment-services

generators.postNote: Expose as a web action (web: true). VERIFY the provider signature before processing (commerce-saas/payment-webhook-verify); keep the signing secret in .env, never inline.

generators.label: Product Recommendations

provisioning.label: Product Recommendations
provisioning.help: Enable Commerce Services Connector + SaaS data export + Recommendations. https://experienceleague.adobe.com/en/docs/commerce-merchant-services/product-recommendations

files.content:
{
  "unit": "${unitName}",
  "typeId": "${unitType}",
  "pageType": "Product",
  "displayNumber": 8,
  "_note": "Recommendation unit consumed by @dropins/storefront-recommendations. typeId drives the Sensei model; behavioral signals come from @adobe/magento-storefront-events-sdk."
}

generators.postNote: Behavioral recs (Sensei). Render the unit via @dropins/storefront-recommendations; the storefront event SDK feeds the behavioral signals.
